title: piqueria pilosa
intro: Piqueria pilosa, also known as the "hairy piqueria," is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of piqueria pilosa include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating fever, as well as showing potential in reducing blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Piqueria pilosa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
